title: README Consolidation and Feature Documentation
content:
## Overview

In commit `4b0f9fd7`, the project's README was rewritten top to bottom based on a direct inventory of the source files, and two supplementary README files were deleted. The goal was to make `README.md` the single source of truth, accurately reflecting what is actually shipped.

## What Changed

### README.md — Full Rewrite

Rather than editing from memory or from the existing stale text, a subagent first read the actual source files to catalogue all shipped functionality before any edits were made. The inventory covered:

- Keyboard bindings
- Game modes and entry points
- Bot profiles and strategies
- Rendering features (including isometric 3D)
- Leaderboard mechanics
- UI elements

The rewrite then proceeded from that inventory. Key structural additions:

- **Headline description** updated to lead with the isometric 3D board (previously unmentioned or buried).
- **"Game modes" section** added, documenting all four entry points: single player, two-player PvP, solo bot, and bot-vs-bot.
- **Bot strategy table** added, covering all 11 bots.
- **Controls table** expanded to include rotation, perspective toggle, overhead view, Enter, and Esc keys.
- **"Coming soon" section** trimmed to only genuinely unshipped items (see below).

### README2.md and README3.md — Deleted

The project previously had three README files. `README2.md` contained forward-looking ideas; `README3.md` contained user feedback. Both were deleted. Their relevant content was merged into the "Coming soon" section of `README.md`. Redundant framing (separate "future plans" and "user feedback" headers) was dropped rather than preserved as subsections.

## Roadmap / Coming Soon (Current State)

Items retained in the "Coming soon" section are **genuinely unshipped**:

| Item | Notes |
|---|---|
| Color blind mode | Requested in both deleted files; deduplicated to one entry |
| First-person view | Unimplemented |
| Rename to "snek" | Unimplemented |
| Global/online leaderboard | Distinct from local per-mode leaderboards that already exist; preserved from README3 user feedback |

Items **removed from the roadmap** because they are fully implemented:

- Isometric 3D board → moved to main feature list
- Two-player mode → moved to main feature list
